mnemonics: GREEN IT: Goals, Regulations, Energy, Emissions, New Tech (for evaluating sustainability effects)
keyPoints: Lifecycle Assessment (LCA) is crucial for evaluating environmental impact from production to disposal.
Energy efficiency metrics (like PUE) are key performance indicators for data center sustainability.
Consider both direct environmental effects and indirect ones like enabling remote work to reduce commuting emissions.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on operational energy use without considering manufacturing and disposal impacts.
Overlooking e-waste management and circular economy principles in sustainability evaluations.
Assuming all cloud solutions are inherently greener without evaluating the provider's actual energy sources.
